command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Verify new token getMe ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getMe' | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== Webhook clear (ensure clean polling, no leftover) ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('deleteWebhook:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('ok'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Check no one else is polling (should NOT conflict) ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getUpdates?timeout=1&offset=-1' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('ok:', d.get('ok'), '| desc:', d.get('description','clean - no conflict'))"
REMOTE
